name: Alex Johnson
summary: Full-stack software engineer with 5 years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean architecture, developer tooling, and turning complex systems into simple, user-friendly products.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Led migration of monolithic REST API to a GraphQL gateway, reducing average response time by 40% and improving frontend developer velocity.
Designed and shipped a real-time notification system using WebSockets and Redis pub/sub, serving 50K+ daily active users.
Mentored a team of 3 junior engineers, conducting weekly code reviews and establishing team coding standards.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built the core billing and subscription management module from scratch using Stripe API and Node.js, processing $2M+ in monthly transactions.
Implemented end-to-end CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Docker, cutting deployment time from 45 minutes to 8 minutes.
Developed a customer-facing analytics dashboard in React with D3.js, increasing user engagement by 25%.

experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Delivered 12+ client projects including e-commerce sites and internal dashboards using React and Express.js.
Introduced automated testing with Jest and Cypress, reducing production bugs by 30%.
